scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n api,web -c green,blue "npm run dev -w @qintopia/api" "npm run dev -w @qintopia/web"
scripts.test:integration: node --import tsx tests/helpers/run-database-test-suite.ts -- npm run test:integration:run --
scripts.test:contract: node --import tsx tests/helpers/run-database-test-suite.ts -- npm run test:contract:run --
scripts.test:contract:run: node --import tsx tests/helpers/assert-database-test-lock.ts && npm run build && vitest run tests/contract
scripts.test:e2e: node --import tsx tests/helpers/run-database-test-suite.ts -- npm run test:e2e:run --
scripts.test:e2e:run: node --import tsx tests/helpers/assert-database-test-lock.ts && npm run build && node --import tsx tests/e2e/setup-database.ts && playwright test
scripts.verify: npm run typecheck && npm run test
scripts.test:all: npm run verify && npm run test:integration && npm run test:contract && npm run test:e2e && npm run test:pricing-facts
